news.t: AdvisorShares ETFs Earn Five-Star & Four-Star Morningstar Ratings™
MSOS and DWAW Available for Investment at LPL Financial LLC

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Dorsey Wright FSM All Cap World ETF (DWAW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of funds that follows a proprietary rules-based momentum strategy and seeks long-term capital appreciation. DWAW was launched on Dec 26, 2019 and is issued by AdvisorShares.
